{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202282416F17DCB8959A875ABE0"}"},"total":352},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610028758902375193","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错，没有那么多小说豪门的勾心斗角，就算有也没有像其他小说一样的忍者神龟，很甜[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771852305,"group_id":"7413258198993341464","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzP5iJ8LmDJkT5iVRjhfe5c=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7e6c7c4ff75a44ec9f56a4803491fab0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707013&x-signature=gD%2F%2FWRpZJ6F2QluZ3af%2Fh7BOZEQ%3D","user_id":"652460122707018","user_name":"^相見^"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"652460122707018","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7413258198993341464","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市日常】【单女主】【无后宫】【校花大小姐】【无重生+无系统】【先婚后爱】【SS+甜甜恋爱】【校园+都市】
林然在天桥上看到一个要自杀的女孩，身为正义青年，他当然不能坐视不管......
林然救下女孩，机缘巧合下又收留她一晚......
三日后，一众限量版豪车停在林然家楼下。
白沐橙看了眼林然对父亲说，“父亲，就是他。”
    白父看向林然的眼神仿佛带着刀子，
　正当林然一脸的懵逼时，
　白父面色严肃道，“你小子把我女儿吃干抹净，不打算负责？”

     不是？
　　冤枉啊？

　　他跟白沐橙之间明明什么都没有发生！！！
　　......
      莫名其妙闪婚，
      刚开始两人只是同在一个屋檐下的陌生人。
      慢慢的白沐橙看林然的眼神越来越不对劲儿了......
      “你吃过其他女生的口水吗？”
        “......”
       “我的腿好看吗？”
        “......”
        “这些是我新买的丝袜，你要摸摸吗？”
